Class Device

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.model.Device
public class Device extends Object
Represents a Smart Home Device. A device has an ID, name, type, current state, and is associated with a room. Supports different device types: Switch, Dimmer, Thermostat.

  • Constructor Details

    • Device

      public Device(String deviceId, String name, String type, String room, boolean state)
      Constructs a Device with the specified parameters.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - unique identifier for the device
      name - display name of the device
      type - device type (Switch, Dimmer, Thermostat)
      room - room where the device is located
      state - initial power state
